data.title: Metacon receives EUR 14.9M payment for delivered electrolysis plant.
data.description: Metacon, based in Stockholm, announced on August 22, 2025, that they have been paid EUR 14.9 million by Motor Oil Hellas for the successful delivery of ten 5 MW electrolysis stacks. This payment amounts to around SEK 166 million at the current exchange rate. The transaction marks a significant milestone for Metacon in their partnership with Motor Oil Hellas.

data.title: HEICO to release Q3 earnings Aug. 25, expected to report $1.14 EPS (up from 97 cents) and $1.12B revenue (up from $992.25M). Annual dividend yield of 0.08%.
data.description: HEICO Corporation, listed on NYSE as HEI, is set to reveal its third-quarter earnings on August 25 after the market closes. Analysts predict the Hollywood-based company will post quarterly earnings of $1.14 per share, a notable increase from 97 cents per share in the same period last year. HEICO is expected to report quarterly revenue of $1.12 billion, up from $992.25 million year-over-year. The company's Electronic Technologies Group recently acquired Gables Engineering, Inc., as announced on July 24. Additionally, HEICO's impressive performance has attracted investor interest in its dividends. Currently, HEICO offers an annual dividend yield of 0.08%, equivalent to a semi-annual dividend payout of 12 cents per share (24 cents annually). For more detailed information, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
Russia says agenda for a possible Putin-Zelenskiy summit is not ready

data.title: 2026 Toyota Prius now available at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville in Vacaville, California for interested customers.
data.description: In Vacaville, California on August 22, 2025, Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville introduced the 2026 Toyota Prius to its customers. This hybrid model is known for its aerodynamic design and versatility. Customers interested in purchasing this vehicle can do so from Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville.

data.title: Saroasis Studios unveils Early Access release date for Fate Trigger game, following a successful Closed Beta Test with hundreds of thousands of players. Set for Q1 2026.
data.description: In Cologne, Germany on August 22, 2025, Saroasis Studios revealed the Early Access launch date for its main game, Fate Trigger, after a prosperous Closed Beta Test attracting hundreds of thousands of players post-launch. The Early Access release is scheduled for the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Working mothers facing challenges with back-to-school chaos and workplace support in 2025; millions juggling tight schedules and childcare logistics.
data.description: In New York on August 22, 2025, it is reported that as the back-to-school season approaches, millions of working mothers are facing additional challenges. These include managing tight schedules, coordinating childcare arrangements, and dealing with longstanding issues regarding support in the workplace. This information is being shared by Mediaplanet.

data.title: Success in achieving health goals is possible with diligence and follow-through. Approach goals with determination.
data.description: Achieving your health goals is just the beginning; what really matters is what you do next. Success hinges on your determination and commitment to see it through. If you approach your goals with diligence and drive, you are on the right path to achieving them. Remember, health goals are attainable if you have the right mindset and approach.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell to speak at Jackson Hole on Friday, covering inflation, interest rates, economy. Will he respond to Trump's criticism?
data.description: The Chairman of the Federal Reserve is set to discuss inflation, interest rates, and the state of the economy in his upcoming speech on Friday. There is anticipation regarding whether he will respond to President Trump's criticisms questioning the independence of the central bank.

data.title: Three real estate teams merge to form Benson Crew, now Real's largest team in Canada with $6 billion in lifetime sales.
data.description: In Miami, a significant development has taken place as three prominent real estate teams have united to form Benson Crew, now established as the largest team in Canada under Real. This merger has resulted in a powerhouse team with a remarkable track record of $6 billion in lifetime sales.

data.title: Repligen Corp (NASDAQ: RGEN) to attend three investor conferences in September.
data.description: A company specializing in bioprocessing technology leadership, Repligen Corporation (NASDAQ:RGEN), based in Waltham, Mass., revealed its plan to participate in three forthcoming investor conferences on August 22, 2025.

data.title: Stock Yards Bancorp appoints David L. Hardy to the Boards of Directors for both the Company and Bank, effective Oct. 21, 2025 in KY. (Numbers: 1 person, Oct. 21, 2025)
data.description: Louisville, Kentucky-based Stock Yards Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: SYBT) revealed that David L. Hardy will join the Boards of Directors for both the Company and the Bank starting from October 21, 2025. The parent company of Stock Yards Bank & Trust Company operates in Louisville, central, eastern, and northern Kentucky, along with the Indianapolis, Indiana, and Cincinnati, Ohio metropolitan areas. Hardy's appointment signifies a key addition to the governance structure of both entities.

data.title: BULGOLD reports Q2 financial results: $114,537 net loss for 3 months, $152,428 for 6 months, $255,401 cash on hand.
data.description: In Toronto on August 22, 2025, BULGOLD Inc. (TSXV: ZLTO) has announced the submission of its unaudited condensed interim financial statements and MD&A for the quarter ended June 30, 2025. During this period, the company experienced a net comprehensive loss of $114,537 ($0.00 per share) for the 3 months, and $152,428 ($0.01 per share) for the first 6 months of the year. As of June 30, 2025, BULGOLD held $255,401 in cash (and cash equivalents).

data.title: Bread Financial's cash tender offers expired, with total aggregate principal amount of 9.750% Senior Notes due 2029 and 8.375% Subordinated Notes due 2035 tendered.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, Bread Financial Holdings, Inc. disclosed that its recent cash tender offers, as outlined in the Offer to Purchase from July 24, 2025, officially ended at 5:00 p.m. ET on August 21, 2025. The Tender Offers pertained to the Company’s 9.750% Senior Notes due 2029 and 8.375% Fixed-Rate Reset Subordinated Notes due 2035. Throughout this period, the total aggregate principal amount of the Notes validly tendered and not withdrawn was detailed in the table below:- 9.750% Senior Notes due 2029 (2029 Notes): [Total amount tendered]- 8.375% Fixed-Rate Reset Subordinated Notes due 2035 (2035 Notes): [Total amount tendered]These figures represent the outcome of Bread Financial's Tender Offers post expiration.

data.title: Andrew Tate fails at trading YZY, losing $700K on Hyperliquid meme coin. #crypto #fail #trading
data.description: Andrew Tate has re-entered the world of meme coins but is struggling to succeed in trading as his wallet is nearing losses of $700,000 on Hyperliquid.
